scenarios.name: one-byte-echo-active
scenarios.description: Open one SOCKS connection, send one byte, and read one echoed byte without a long idle period.
observations: HEAD close-marker checks are visible in the request mix.
LIST open-session polling is part of baseline request volume.

scenarios.name: one-byte-echo-after-idle
scenarios.description: Open one SOCKS connection, hold it idle for the configured duration, then send and echo one byte.
observations: HEAD close-marker checks are visible in the request mix.
LIST open-session polling is part of baseline request volume.

scenarios.name: small-chatty-writes
scenarios.description: Send ordered 100-byte writes for the configured duration and verify echoed order.
observations: HEAD close-marker checks are visible in the request mix.
LIST open-session polling is part of baseline request volume.

scenarios.name: bulk-one-mib
scenarios.description: Send and echo one contiguous MiB, verifying SHA-256 and exact byte count.
observations: HEAD close-marker checks are visible in the request mix.
LIST open-session polling is part of baseline request volume.

scenarios.name: short-connections
scenarios.description: Open sequential short SOCKS connections and exchange a small request/response on each.
observations: HEAD close-marker checks are visible in the request mix.
LIST open-session polling is part of baseline request volume.

scenarios.name: concurrent-idle-sessions
scenarios.description: Open idle SOCKS sessions for a bounded period and measure background polling.
observations: GET not_found polling misses are at least half of observed object-store operations.
HEAD close-marker checks are visible in the request mix.
LIST open-session polling is part of baseline request volume.

scenarios.name: mixed-traffic
scenarios.description: Run one bulk stream, small request/response streams, and idle streams at the same time.
observations: HEAD close-marker checks are visible in the request mix.
LIST open-session polling is part of baseline request volume.
